description: This file defines an asynchronous function `write_audit_log` that persists audit log records into a database. It uses FastAPI's Request object and SQLAlchemy's AsyncSession to capture request details and save an AuditLog instance.

classes.name: AuditLog
classes.description: Model class representing an audit log record in the database

methods.name: None write_audit_log( *, db: AsyncSession, request: Request, actor_user_id: uuid.UUID | None, actor_email: str | None, action: str, entity_type: str | None = None, entity_id: uuid.UUID | None = None, details: dict[str, Any] | None = None, )
methods.description: Asynchronously writes an audit log record including request and user details into the database

ctags.name: write_audit_log
ctags.signature: ( *, db: AsyncSession, request: Request, actor_user_id: uuid.UUID | None, actor_email: str | None, action: str, entity_type: str | None = None, entity_id: uuid.UUID | None = None, details: dict[str, Any] | None = None, )
